title: zehneria boholensis
intro: Zehneria boholensis, also known as Bohol wild cucumber, is a type of flowering plant native to the Philippines. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are believed to contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, among other ailments. Herbal preparations of Zehneria boholensis can be made by drying the leaves and roots, which are then used to create teas, infusions, or topical applications.
